project_type: Shopify Dawn-based theme with premium header and mega navigation sections
build_system: None - Shopify theme files served directly. No compilation step.
test_framework: None - manual Shopify theme validation. AST/syntax checking via Python scripts in prior tasks.
build_command: N/A - no build step. Validation is done by checking Liquid syntax and JSON schema validity.
test_command: python3 -c "import json; [json.loads(open(f).read().split('{% schema %}')[1].split('{% endschema %}')[0]) for f in ['sections/header.liquid','sections/mega-navigation.liquid']]"
verification_instructions: 1. Validate JSON schemas parse correctly. 2. Check that all CSS variables referenced in Liquid have corresponding schema settings. 3. Verify no unclosed tags/brackets. 4. Count settings match expected totals.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - pure file editing of Liquid/CSS/JS files.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode. No Shopify CLI available. No Docker needed. Validation via Python JSON parsing and manual inspection.
contribution_requirements: Shopify range settings: default MUST be a valid step from min. Shopify color picker never returns blank. Range settings only support integers. For decimal values use integers and divide in CSS.
key_patterns: CSS: BEM-like classes prefixed with mega-nav- or hp-. JS: IIFE pattern with no globals. Liquid: section settings use mn_ prefix for mega-nav, hp_ prefix for premium header. Schema JSON is embedded in {% schema %} tags. CSS vars set in Liquid style block, consumed in separate .css asset files.
directory_structure: sections/ - Liquid section files with schema. assets/ - CSS and JS files. snippets/ - reusable Liquid partials.
